retrieved_result: Add File Name and Path to Word 2007/2010 Documents Add File Name and Path to Word 2007/2010 Documents Posted on March 5, 2011 by Ronny Would you like to be able to insert the path and filename into a Word document while that document is in process, so the location is readily available? In Word 2007 and 2010, this involves inserting the Filename fiel
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses inserting path and filename into Word documents (Word 2007/2010) and is unrelated to Docker setup; it does not address Docker concepts, installation, or beginner guidance.
